top_signals.title: What to Know About SpaceX’s Record-Breaking IPO
top_signals.summary: SpaceX had the largest stock-market debut in history when it went public on June 12. The company raised $75 billion in the initial public offering and ended its first day on the public markets with a market capitalization of around $2.2 trillion. The IPO turned SpaceX founder Elon Musk into the world’s first trillionaire.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Sam Bankman-Fried loses fraud conviction appeal
top_signals.summary: Three-judge panel upholds 25-year prison sentence for founder of collapsed crypto exchange FTX
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: South Korea hits Coupang with record $409 million fine over data breach
top_signals.summary: The penalty is the largest ever issued by the commission for a personal data breach, surpassing the record 134.8 billion won ($88.8 million) fine levied against SK Telecom earlier this year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
